svg.text: 1. 6 pogo pin holes (P75/P100 series), 2.5mm dia, 10mm c-t-c
3. 4x M3 clearance holes (3.2mm) for mounting to dock ceiling
4. Wire routing channel (5mm W x 4mm D) on back edge
5. Drainage grooves (2mm W x 1.5mm D) flank pin row
6. Mounts to dock ceiling at Z=80-84, X centered at 106mm
7. Contact pads on cartridge: 8mm x 5mm, nickel-plated brass
8. Minimum 3 pins: GND, Motor A 12V, Motor B 12V
Optional 3 more: cartridge ID, temp sensor, spare
